whyChooseUs.eyebrow: Why the island moves with us
whyChooseUs.title: We don’t just offer taxis; we offer real peace of mind and efficiency
whyChooseUs.subtitle: Our platform is designed to respond to Lanzarote’s mobility needs with speed, accuracy, and a fully local approach.

fastDeployment.title: Fast Deployment
fastDeployment.description: Average assignment times under 4 minutes thanks to our proximity-based algorithm.

efficiency.title: Maximum Efficiency
efficiency.description: Smart assignment reduces idle time and optimizes every taxi journey.

localExperts.title: Local Experts
localExperts.description: Drivers who know every area, access point, roundabout, and key location on the island.

security.title: 24/7 Security
security.description: Continuous monitoring, trip traceability, and support available at all times.

whyChooseNexTaxi.title: Why Choose NexTaxi?
whyChooseNexTaxi.subtitle: We provide the safest and most efficient transport experience across Lanzarote.

availability.title: 24/7 Availability
availability.description: Always there when you need us, day or night.

localExperts.title: Local Experts
localExperts.description: Experienced, licensed drivers who know every corner of Lanzarote.

coverage.title: Island-Wide Coverage
coverage.description: From Arrecife Airport to Playa Blanca and beyond.

contactBanner.title: Ready to get in touch with us?
contactBanner.description: Our team is available to help you with bookings, questions, or additional information.
